title: hypenia pruinosa
intro: Hypenia pruinosa, also known as the powder-puff or powder puff mint, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It is a herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues such as fever, cough, and cold. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used in herbal preparations to provide relief from respiratory problems and to support immune function. In addition to its medicinal properties, Hypenia pruinosa has been used in traditional medicine to aid in digestion and reduce inflammation, and it can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture.
